testcase.name: testAdvanceTickByOne()
testcase.system-out: unique-id: [engine:junit-jupiter]/[class:simcli.engine.TimeManagerTest]/[method:testAdvanceTickByOne()] display-name: advanceTick() increments tick by exactly 1

testcase.name: testSleepFromEveningTick20()
testcase.system-out: unique-id: [engine:junit-jupiter]/[class:simcli.engine.TimeManagerTest]/[method:testSleepFromEveningTick20()] display-name: Sleep from tick 20 (8 PM) advances exactly 12 ticks to 8 AM

testcase.name: testTravelToCurrentLocation()
testcase.error: java.lang.NullPointerException: Cannot invoke "simcli.engine.GameEngine.getNpcManager()" because "this.engine" is null at simcli.engine.WorldManager.setupWorld(WorldManager.java:79) at simcli.IntegrationTest.setUp(IntegrationTest.java:54) at java.base/java.lang.reflect.Method.invoke(Method.java:565) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1604) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1604)
testcase.system-out: unique-id: [engine:junit-jupiter]/[class:simcli.IntegrationTest]/[method:testTravelToCurrentLocation()] display-name: Edge Case: Travel to the exact location you are already standing in

testcase.name: testTimeOfDayMorning()
testcase.system-out: unique-id: [engine:junit-jupiter]/[class:simcli.engine.TimeManagerTest]/[method:testTimeOfDayMorning()] display-name: getTimeOfDay() returns 'Morning' in first quarter of day

testcase.name: testHouseInfoInCommercialLocation()

testcase.name: testWorkOnMonday()
testcase.system-out: unique-id: [engine:junit-jupiter]/[class:simcli.engine.commands.WorkCommandTest]/[method:testWorkOnMonday()] display-name: Working on Monday advances ticks

testcase.name: testWorkOnSundayBlocked()
testcase.system-out: unique-id: [engine:junit-jupiter]/[class:simcli.engine.commands.WorkCommandTest]/[method:testWorkOnSundayBlocked()] display-name: Working on Sunday is blocked and returns NO_TICK

testcase.name: testAdvanceTicksByN()
testcase.system-out: unique-id: [engine:junit-jupiter]/[class:simcli.engine.TimeManagerTest]/[method:testAdvanceTicksByN()] display-name: advanceTicks(n) increments tick by exactly n

testcase.name: testDayOneAtTickOne()
testcase.system-out: unique-id: [engine:junit-jupiter]/[class:simcli.engine.TimeManagerTest]/[method:testDayOneAtTickOne()] display-name: getCurrentDay() returns 1 on tick 1

testcase.name: testUnderageJobApplication()

testcase.system-out: unique-id: [engine:junit-jupiter]/[class:simcli.IntegrationTest]/[method:testUnderageJobApplication()] display-name: Edge Case: Apply for a job you are too young for (Age Boundary)

testcase.name: testTimeOfDayEvening()
testcase.system-out: unique-id: [engine:junit-jupiter]/[class:simcli.engine.TimeManagerTest]/[method:testTimeOfDayEvening()] display-name: getTimeOfDay() returns 'Evening' in third quarter

testcase.name: testTimeOfDayAfternoon()
testcase.system-out: unique-id: [engine:junit-jupiter]/[class:simcli.engine.TimeManagerTest]/[method:testTimeOfDayAfternoon()] display-name: getTimeOfDay() returns 'Afternoon' in second quarter

testcase.name: testAdvanceTicksByZero()
testcase.system-out: unique-id: [engine:junit-jupiter]/[class:simcli.engine.TimeManagerTest]/[method:testAdvanceTicksByZero()] display-name: advanceTicks(0) does NOT change the tick

testcase.name: testWorkOnSaturdayBlocked()
testcase.system-out: unique-id: [engine:junit-jupiter]/[class:simcli.engine.commands.WorkCommandTest]/[method:testWorkOnSaturdayBlocked()] display-name: Working on Saturday is blocked and returns NO_TICK

testcase.name: testSleepLandsAtCorrectTick()
testcase.system-out: unique-id: [engine:junit-jupiter]/[class:simcli.engine.TimeManagerTest]/[method:testSleepLandsAtCorrectTick()] display-name: Sleep fast-forward actually lands at tick % 24 == 8

testcase.name: testDayThreeAtTick49()
testcase.system-out: unique-id: [engine:junit-jupiter]/[class:simcli.engine.TimeManagerTest]/[method:testDayThreeAtTick49()] display-name: getCurrentDay() returns 3 when tick crosses 48 boundary

testcase.name: testSleepFromMidnight()
testcase.system-out: unique-id: [engine:junit-jupiter]/[class:simcli.engine.TimeManagerTest]/[method:testSleepFromMidnight()] display-name: Sleep from tick 0 (midnight) advances exactly 8 ticks to 8 AM

testcase.name: testDayTwoAtTick25()
testcase.system-out: unique-id: [engine:junit-jupiter]/[class:simcli.engine.TimeManagerTest]/[method:testDayTwoAtTick25()] display-name: getCurrentDay() returns 2 when tick crosses 24 boundary

testcase.name: testTimeOfDayNight()
testcase.system-out: unique-id: [engine:junit-jupiter]/[class:simcli.engine.TimeManagerTest]/[method:testTimeOfDayNight()] display-name: getTimeOfDay() returns 'Night' in final quarter
